title: Healthcare Quality Associate
description: Syneos Health is hiring a Healthcare Quality Associate to support quality assurance and compliance activities for our Salt Lake City clinical research operations. You will conduct quality reviews, document findings, develop corrective action plans, and work collaboratively with site teams to ensure adherence to GCP standards and regulatory requirements.
responsibilities: Conduct quality audits and site inspections for clinical research facilities
Document audit findings and develop corrective action plans
Verify compliance with GCP, ICH, and regulatory guidelines
Prepare quality reports for management and regulatory submissions
Coordinate with site teams on quality improvements
Maintain audit documentation and regulatory files

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Healthcare, Life Sciences, Business, or related field
skills: Knowledge of Good Clinical Practice (GCP) standards

benefits: Comprehensive health insurance including medical, dental, and vision
Tuition reimbursement for regulatory and compliance certifications
Hybrid work schedule with collaborative environment
